summary: Image_gen-first exploratory YouTube mockup package for Cascade Effects channel surfaces and Challenger episode thumbnail/Shorts cover directions.

generation_policy.generated_text_policy: exploratory_image_gen_text_review_only; exact typography may be repaired later

channel-banner.title_policy: title-bearing generated text Cascade of Effects

youtube-podcast-playlist.title_policy: title-bearing generated text Cascade of Effects

video-thumbnail.title_policy: episode hook only; no generic channel title/logo

shorts-cover-frame.role: Challenger episode Shorts cover frame mockup
shorts-cover-frame.title_policy: episode hook only; no generic channel title/logo

review_notes: This package is exploratory and not a publish candidate.
Generated text appears generally readable in review sheets, but exact title/hook typography remains image_gen text and must be rechecked or repaired before any publish package.
Thumbnail and Shorts directions are Challenger episode-content-led and intentionally omit generic channel title/logo treatment.
Channel banner and podcast variants are title-bearing channel identity mockups; some variants include broader channel-symbol subjects and should be selected or tightened by human review.
